Name: Goblin
Notes: Cowardly alone; dangerous in numbers. Flee when half their group falls.

Name: Goblin Shaman
Special: Hex 1/day: target -1 all rolls until rest (save resists)
Notes: Hangs back. Curses strongest PC first. Priority target.

Name: Orc Raider
Special: Aggressive: never checks morale while warchief lives
Notes: Hits harder than expected. Serve a warchief.

Name: Orc Veteran
Special: Veteran (+1 ATK). Frightful presence: save or -1 ATK/DEF
Notes: Scarred and experienced. Presence unsettles lesser warriors.

Name: Kreen Warrior
Special: Veteran (+1 ATK). Natural chitin AR1 (free). Cannot be surprised.
Notes: Cannot be surprised. Chitin counts as armor for crit purposes.

Name: Cave Bear
Special: Grab on hit: held target takes auto d8/round, STR task to escape. Keen scent.
Notes: Not hostile unless cornered or protecting cubs.

Name: Bound Spirit
Special: Spell-like ability 1/day. Intangible: mundane weapons half damage.
Notes: Magic weapons deal full damage. Fragile but elusive.

Name: Swamp Troll
Special: Regeneration: 3 HP/round, stopped by fire or acid. Keen scent.
Notes: Tracks by scent. Rarely abandons a chase. Immortal unless wounds cauterized.

Name: Iron Sentinel
Special: Veteran (+1 ATK). Never flees. Immune to poison/fear/mental (construct).
Notes: Ancient relic guardian. Does not negotiate.

Name: Stone Giant
Special: Frightful presence: save or -1 ATK/DEF. Boulder throw (free): AGI save for half.

Name: Elder Wyvern
Special: Veteran (+1 ATK). Poison sting: RES save or condition 2 slots. Frightful presence. Keen senses.
Notes: Sting counts as third attack. Disengages freely if airborne.

Name: Ancient Dragon
Special: Breath weapon: 5d10 fire cone save for half bypasses AR. Frightful presence. Legendary resistance 1/encounter.
Notes: Highly intelligent. Will not fight on unfavorable terms.

Name: Void Colossus
Special: Reality pulse 1/day: 5d12 all in area save or lose next action. Legendary resistance 2/encounter. Frightful presence: entire visible area.
Notes: Ancient construct or cosmic entity of unclear origin.
